identity.name: GolTube
identity.design_principle: Every interaction feels like a highlight reel.

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, video titles, and big stats. Letter-spacing should be tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for descriptions, metadata, and UI elements. It has a tech-sport hybrid feel.

colors.description: The site changes its 'Jersey' (color theme) on every session. Base is always Dark Mode (Night Match).
colors.instructions: Implement a ThemeContext that randomly picks a 'kit' on mount and sets the CSS variables (--primary, --accent) accordingly.

textures.noise: Overlay a subtle noise texture (opacity 0.03) on the background to simulate stadium atmosphere/grain.
textures.mesh: Use a 'Jersey Mesh' pattern for card backgrounds or hover states.

borders.style: Sharp or Pill-shaped. Avoid standard 4px/8px radius. Go for 0px (Brutalist Sport) or 9999px (Stadium Shape).
borders.active_state: Active inputs/cards should have a 'Glow' effect matching the current Kit's primary color.

buttons.primary: Solid color (Kit Primary), Text (Kit Foreground), Uppercase, Bold, Tracking-wide. Shape: Skewed -10deg for speed illusion.

cards.video_card: Aspect ratio 16:9. No padding. Image full width. Metadata overlay on bottom gradient. Hover: Image scales 1.05x.
cards.stat_card: Dark background (#18181b), Border-left 4px solid var(--primary). Big number font.

inputs.search_bar: Massive height (h-14 or h-16). Background #27272a. Text White. Icon: Search icon in Primary Color.

layout.grid_system: Masonry or Bento Grid for video results. Avoid uniform rows.
layout.spacing: Generous. Use gap-6 or gap-8. Section padding py-12 or py-16.

motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in-up for grid items (0.1s delay per item).
motion.hover: Instant feedback. Scale up, brightness up, or border glow.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Create a 'ThemeContext.js' to handle the random kit selection.
3. Update 'index.css' to support the dynamic variables.
5. Ensure the Search Bar is the most prominent element on the Landing Page.
6. Use the provided image URLs for placeholders.
7. Implement a 'Dark Mode' by default. The 'Light Mode' should only be an option if requested, but optimize for Dark.
8. For the 'Goal Type' filter, use icons or small illustrations if possible.
9. Ensure the 'History' dashboard looks like a 'Match Report' or 'Season Stats' page.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic gradients. Use solid, bold colors.
Avoid 'Inter' font for headings. Use the specified 'Barlow Condensed'.
Make sure the video player container is responsive (aspect-video).
Do not center text in cards; left-align for better readability.
Use 'framer-motion' for the page transitions if possible, or simple CSS transitions.
